evidence: Active provider auth is VM-side, not host-side.
recommended_change: Remove or minimize host-side duplicate provider secret if host runtime is not authoritative.

evidence: isa_cost_optimizer/middleware_api.py reads cost_optimization_stack from .openclaw/control-plane.json.
recommended_change: Keep synchronized with isa_cost_optimizer middleware tests and runtime expectations.

evidence: VM runtime default is read from /root/.openclaw/openclaw.json.
recommended_change: Do not treat this as the OpenClaw runtime default; VM agents.defaults.model.primary remains authoritative.

evidence: control-plane fallback_models=[], vm fallbacks=[]
recommended_change: Keep aligned with VM runtime fallbacks.

evidence: server/security/automation-auth.ts reads the policy envelope.
recommended_change: Keep aligned with server/security/automation-auth.ts and production env flags.

evidence: Current runtime contract is VM-first.
recommended_change: Keep VM-only unless host-gateway support is intentionally implemented and validated.

evidence: VM tools.deny includes group:web and browser.
recommended_change: Keep as defense-in-depth, but document that VM tools.deny already blocks browser and web at the gateway.

evidence: scripts/openclaw-safe-exec.sh reads this policy.
recommended_change: Treat as wrapper-policy only; do not assume native OpenClaw runtime enforcement.

evidence: routing defaults.model=openrouter/moonshotai/kimi-k2.5, vm primary=openrouter/moonshotai/kimi-k2.5
recommended_change: Keep launcher default aligned with VM runtime default.

evidence: scripts/openclaw-model-route.sh and launcher wrappers use this file.
recommended_change: Keep using for launcher-assisted routing, but do not present it as automatic runtime model switching.

evidence: scripts/openclaw-skill-admit.sh and scripts/openclaw-skill-install.sh read this file.
recommended_change: Keep entries reviewed and checksum-pinned.

evidence: Launcher wrappers read .openclaw/launcher/last_model_route.json.
recommended_change: Safe to keep; it drives reuse-last-route launcher behavior.

evidence: openclaw models status reports the VM default model.
recommended_change: This is the authoritative default model; align UI/router policy with it or change it deliberately here.

evidence: VM runtime fallbacks currently determine actual failover behavior.
recommended_change: Add fallbacks if runtime resilience matters, or keep empty and remove conflicting fallback declarations elsewhere.

evidence: Current policy posture depends on these denies.
recommended_change: Retain unless you intentionally reopen browser/web capabilities and revalidate governance.

evidence: Gateway is running loopback-only.
recommended_change: Keep loopback unless remote exposure is required; if exposed, configure trustedProxies.

evidence: Gateway auth mode is token.
recommended_change: Keep VM-only; never duplicate in repo or host artifacts.

evidence: Provider auth resolves from env OPENROUTER_API_KEY.
recommended_change: Keep in VM runtime only; avoid host duplication unless host-runtime use is required.

evidence: auth.profiles is empty in current VM runtime.
recommended_change: Keep empty if env-based auth remains the standard.

evidence: VM exec approvals socket config contains token material.
recommended_change: Treat as secret runtime socket credential; do not export or mirror.

evidence: Paired devices file contains operator device tokens.
recommended_change: Rotate and prune stale operator device tokens if not actively needed; keep strictly VM-local.

evidence: cron/jobs.json contains jobs=[].
recommended_change: No change unless scheduled automation is intended; current state has no jobs configured.
